defect: the open-ended "find all hazards in this jobsite photo" item - cords across walkways, missing guardrails, blocked egress/extinguishers, improvised scaffolds, unattended open holes
prompt: Identify the safety hazards, their severity, and the immediate controls required.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. The work under review is Housekeeping & general hazard recognition, part of the Safety & Rigging scope. The observed field condition is: the open-ended "find all hazards in this jobsite photo" item - cords across walkways, missing guardrails, blocked egress/extinguishers, improvised scaffolds, unattended open holes. The work is actively in progress. Reference material on hand: OSHA general duty, 1926 Subpart L (scaffolds).
title: Hazard check: Housekeeping & general hazard recognition (service call)
